_meta.method: Web research on Bodhi Zendo (Sanbo Zen, Tamil Nadu) and AMA Samy lineage.
_meta.coverageEstimate: High for the principal standing Zen monastery in India (Bodhi Zendo). Low for other lineages.
knownGaps: No standing Plum Village monastery in India verified; Plum Village India activity is limited to occasional retreats and lay sanghas.
Buddha-vacana Zen India referenced in brief not located via sourced URL.
No Sotoshu-listed Soto Zen temple in India found in official directory.

places.name: Bodhi Zendo
places.address: Bodhi Zendo, Perumalmalai, Kodaikanal Hills, Dindigul District, Tamil Nadu 624212, India
places.notes: Sanbo Zen monastery founded 1996 by AMA Samy (Yamada Koun Roshi-authorized teacher, 1982). Long and short sesshin in the Sanbo Kyodan tradition; integrates Christian, Buddhist and Advaita strands.
